Description.description: Structured long-form or rich-text description content for a product or variant.

plain.description: Plain-text description intended for clients that do not render rich formatting.

example.plain: Classic cotton tee in red, size small.

Price.description: Monetary amount expressed in minor units with an associated ISO 4217 currency code.

amount.description: Monetary amount expressed in ISO 4217 minor units.

Availability.description: Purchasability and fulfillment state for a variant.

available.description: Indicates whether the variant is currently purchasable. Use status for fulfillment context.

status.description: Extensible fulfillment state for the variant. Known values include in_stock, limited_stock, backorder, preorder, out_of_stock, and discontinued.

Barcode.description: Machine-readable identifier attached to a variant, such as a GTIN or UPC.

type.description: Barcode scheme or identifier type, such as GTIN, UPC, or EAN.

value.description: Raw barcode value as provided by the merchant.

Media.description: Media asset associated with a product or variant.

type.description: Media kind, such as image, video, or model.

url.description: Canonical URL where the media asset can be retrieved.

alt_text.description: Human-readable alternate text describing the asset.

width.description: Rendered width of the asset in pixels, when known.

height.description: Rendered height of the asset in pixels, when known.

VariantOption.description: One selected characteristic of a variant, such as size or color.

name.description: Display name of the option dimension, such as Color or Size.

value.description: Selected option value for this variant.

Category.description: Category assignment for a product or variant within a specific taxonomy.

value.description: Category label or hierarchical path, for example Mens > Sweaters > Crewnecks.

taxonomy.description: Names the taxonomy system used for the category value, such as google_product_category, shopify, or merchant.

Link.description: Merchant-provided informational or policy link associated with a seller.

type.description: Extensible link type, such as privacy_policy, terms_of_service, refund_policy, shipping_policy, or faq.

title.description: Human-readable label for the linked resource.

url.description: Canonical URL for the linked resource.

Seller.description: Merchant or seller identity associated with a variant offer.

name.description: Display name of the seller or merchant of record.

links.description: Informational or policy links associated with this seller.

Condition.description: Extensible list of applicable item conditions, such as new or secondhand.

items.description: Condition label supplied by the merchant.

Measure.description: Measured quantity paired with a unit for unit-price calculations.

value.description: Measured quantity for the package or item.

unit.description: Unit label for the measured quantity, such as oz, ml, or kg.

ReferenceMeasure.description: Reference unit used when normalizing a unit price for display.

value.description: Reference quantity used to normalize the unit price.

unit.description: Reference unit label, such as ml, g, or oz.

UnitPrice.description: Normalized unit price for products sold by weight, volume, or measure.

amount.description: Normalized price amount expressed in ISO 4217 minor units.

measure.description: Actual packaged measure associated with the sale item.

reference.description: Reference measure used to display the normalized unit price.

Variant.description: Purchasable variant of a product within a feed.

id.description: Stable global identifier for this variant.

description.description: Structured description content for the variant.

url.description: Canonical URL for the variant detail page.

barcodes.description: Machine-readable identifiers associated with this variant.

price.description: Active selling price for the variant.

list_price.description: Reference or pre-discount price for the variant.

availability.description: Purchasability and fulfillment state for the variant.

categories.description: Category assignments associated with this variant.

condition.description: Extensible list of conditions applicable to this variant.

variant_options.description: Option selections that distinguish this variant, such as Color: Red or Size: Small.

media.description: Media assets specific to this variant. The first item is the primary listing asset.

seller.description: Seller or merchant of record for this variant.

marketplace.description: Marketplace or intermediary platform through which this variant is offered, if applicable.

description.plain: Classic cotton tee in red, size small.

media.alt_text: Classic Tee in red, size small

Product.description: Catalog product grouping one or more purchasable variants within a feed.

id.description: Stable global identifier for this product.

description.description: Structured description content for the product.

url.description: Canonical URL for the product detail page.

media.description: Media assets associated with the product.

variants.description: Purchasable variants grouped under this product.

FeedMetadata.description: Server-managed metadata describing a feed resource.

id.description: Stable identifier for the feed resource.

target_country.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code describing the feed's target market.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update applied to this feed.

CreateFeedRequest.description: Request payload used to create a feed.

target_country.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code describing the feed's target market.

ProductsResponse.description: Response envelope containing the current product set for a feed.

products.description: Full list of products currently associated with the feed.

UpsertProductsRequest.description: Request payload that partially upserts products into a feed. Products omitted from the request remain unchanged.

products.description: Subset of products to create or update within the feed, matched by Product.id.

Error.description: Structured error returned when a feed request cannot be fulfilled.

code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

param.description: Optional request parameter or field associated with the error.
